title: Zalingei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zalingei with a Z-Score of +6.06. This event is classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zalingei is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 20.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 13%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.6 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating requirements.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
